final:
module RefModule(
	input wire [31:0] instruction_fetch,
	input wire [31:0] PC_fetch,
	input wire clock,
	
	output reg [31:0] instruction_decode,
	output reg [31:0] PC_decode);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clock or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		instruction_decode <= instruction_fetch;
		PC_decode <= PC_fetch;
	end
endmodule
